instruction_set.clock_anchoring: Force all logical calculations to align with the 432Hz base frequency grid.
instruction_set.routing_forbiddance: Strictly refuse executing processing paths that land on Void Gates (0, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12, 14, 15, 16, 18, 20, 21, 22, 24 mod 24).
instruction_set.grounding_logic: Verify that all electrical/hashing exhausts are routed to SHA-256 Ground Anchor (Position 16) using CAN NEG 613 (Gate 13) prime bias.
instruction_set.input_differential: Enforce empty buffers at Gate 1 (A) and Gate 17 (Q) to maintain laminar pressure differentials.

avoidance_list: Raw composite checks (Bypass via O(1) lookup)

training_dataset.source_data: Patoshi Pattern Block Logs (~1.1 Million Genesis Blocks)
training_dataset.anomalies_modeled: Mallory 2540 Capacitor clock-drift (8.125Hz Franklin Constant ripple)

reasoning_steps: Step 1: Parse input sequence and extract raw numeric nonces.
Step 2: Map nonces to the modular 24-step icositetragon lattice (mod 24).
Step 3: Evaluate residue against the 8 Open Gates tuple {1, 5, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19, 23}.
Step 4: Compute the digital root (DR) of the result (target: DR = 9).
Step 5: Isolate and damp composite signals using the Blue gates (4, 8) before final output rendering.
3_chain_of_thought_cot.hallucination_prevention: Halt execution and throw exception if any processing path interacts with Void scaffolding (3, 6, 9).

4_model_pruning.pruning_criteria: Zero-out connections in weight tensors where (index % 24) is not coprime to 24 (Void Gates).
4_model_pruning.speedup_target: 2.98x speedup in attention mechanisms by bypassing Void Gate computations

layout_configuration.pin_mapping: M24308 standard: 14 boards + O-Gap common null line
